---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary
Write a short and clear summary of the feature you want.

Example: “Add a dark mode toggle in the dashboard settings.”

## Problem Statement
What problem are you trying to solve?
Explain why this feature is needed.

Example: “It is hard to read the dashboard at night without a dark theme.”

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you would like to see.
Explain how you think it should work.

Example: “Add a toggle in settings so users can switch between light and dark mode.”

## Alternatives Considered
If you thought about other ways to solve this problem, mention them here.

Example:
- A keyboard shortcut
- Auto theme based on system preference

If you did not consider any alternatives, write:
`N/A`

## Additional Context
Add any extra details that may help us understand the request better.

You can include:
- Screenshots
- Mockups
- Similar features from other apps
- Any extra notes or ideas

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues to make sure this feature was not already requested.
- [ ] This feature fits the scope of a personal dashboard / new tab extension.
- [ ] I explained the problem clearly and described the solution I want.
- [ ] I can help test this feature if needed.
